(a) The department shall issue specialty license plates for persons who served in the United States armed services and participated in Operation Enduring Freedom. The license plates must include the words “Enduring Freedom.”

markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 504. License Plates
##### § 504.314 — Enduring Freedom Veterans

(a) The department shall issue specialty license plates for persons who served in the United States armed services and participated in Operation Enduring Freedom. The license plates must include the words “Enduring Freedom.”

(b) The department shall issue specialty license plates for persons who served in the United States armed services and participated in Operation Enduring Freedom in Afghanistan. The license plates must include the words “Enduring Freedom Afghanistan.”

*Acts 2013, 83rd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1327 (S.B.597), Sec. 1, eff. September 1, 2013.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: The department shall issue specialty license plates for persons who served in the United States armed services and participated in Operation Enduring Freedom. The license plates must include the words “Enduring Freedom.”

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: The department shall issue specialty license plates for persons who served in the United States armed services and participated in Operation Enduring Freedom in Afghanistan. The license plates must include the words “Enduring Freedom Afghanistan.”
